title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Dorry, Unknown person #1, King Harald, Usopp, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Born into the bloodline of the ancient giants, the Prince possessed a colossal body, monstrous strength, and high status.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He grew into an arrogant and unruly rogue that no one could rein in.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What a bore. Everyone outside Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The kingdom of burnt, new world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Standing ten meters tall, each of her steps is an earthquake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her roar is thunder itself! She's one of the world's elusive giants, hailing all the way from Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get away from the cage!! It's dangerous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bara Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They were fools to mock Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No need to thank me! I'm the King of Elbaf! I couldn't just sit back while they slightest my homeland!!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
